Angular test evaluates an applicant's skills in AngularJS Basics, AngularJS APIs and Services, along with hands on programming skills. AngularJS coding test is a popular, open-source, dynamic front-end web framework designed on Javascipt.

## Inside this AngularJS Assessment

The AngularJS coding test by Mercer | Mettl has been holistically designed to evaluate a candidate's knowledge and applied coding skills. This Angular JS online coding test by Mercer | Mettl evaluates an applicant's skills in AngularJS Basics, AngularJS APIs and Services, along with hands-on Programming skills. The mentioned subskills are assessed on three level; basic, intermediate and advanced.

This **60-minutes** test includes **18 MCQs and 2 coding problems** to be solved on a front-end simulator in real time. The simulator is infused with a minimalistic interface with frames corresponding to editable HTML, JS and CSS fields. 

**Key profiles this online AngularJS test is used for:**

* AngularJS Developer
* Software Developer 1 (AngularJS)
* Front-End Developer (AngularJS)

## AngularJS Competency Framework

Get a detailed look inside the test

AngularJS Competencies Under Scanner

### AngularJS Assessment

#### Competencies:

Hands-on Programming

This AngularJS coding test evaluates a candidate's front-end development skills on basic and intermediate levels using AngularJS framework.

AngularJS Basics

The AngularJS online test evaluates the following subskills: Compile, Controllers, Directives, Expressions, Filters, HTTP, Scope, Validation, Forms Validation and SQL.

AngularJS APIs and Services

This AngularJS assessment test evaluates the following subskills: APIs, Custom Directive and Custom Services.

## Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)

Including an AngularJS Test in the hiring process can be highly beneficial. It helps ensure potential candidates possess the requisite skills to excel in front-end development roles. This saves time by conducting preliminary evaluations and leads to more informed hiring decisions.  

The AngularJS Test functions as an effective screening tool to evaluate candidates' proficiency in AngularJS and its components. It assesses their familiarity with essential concepts like components, directives, and services. By administering this test, you can identify candidates who possess conceptual knowledge and apply it to real-world scenarios. This ensures that the individuals you hire are well-prepared to contribute to the success of your front-end development projects. 

Yes. We understand that every organization has unique job requirements and expectations. Our AngularJS Test can be customized to include questions that align with your role requirements. This helps ensure that you are ascertaining candidates' fitment based on the skills and knowledge relevant to the roles you are hiring for, helping you find the best fit for your team.
